de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.metaconstruct

extends Object

    • Field Detail

      • outerLabel

        private final SchemaVariable outerLabel
        the outer label that is used to leave the while loop ('l1')

      • innerLabel

        private final SchemaVariable innerLabel
        the inner label ('l2')

      • instantiations

        private ImmutableList<SchemaVariable> instantiations
        list of the labels

      • breakList

        private LinkedList<BreakToBeReplaced> breakList
        list of breaks that lead to abrupt termination of the loop to be transformed. Is initialised by the method neededInstantiations that is invoked before calculate

      • javaInfo

        private JavaInfo javaInfo
        The JavaInfo object which is handed over as a parameter of calculate.

    • Method Detail

      • init

        private void init(Term initialPost,
                  Term invariantFramingTermination,
                  Services services)
        initialises this meta operator
        Parameters:
        term - the instantiated Term passed to the TermTransformer
        services - the Services providing access to signature and type model

      • transform

        public Term transform(TermLabelState termLabelState,
                      Rule rule,
                      RuleApp ruleApp,
                      Goal goal,
                      Sequent applicationSequent,
                      PosInOccurrence applicationPos,
                      Term initialPost,
                      Term invariantFramingTermination,
                      SVInstantiations svInst,
                      Services services)
        calculates the resulting term.

      • computeLoopBodyModalityLabels

        private ImmutableArray<TermLabel> computeLoopBodyModalityLabels(TermLabelState termLabelState,
                                                                Services services,
                                                                PosInOccurrence applicationPos,
                                                                Rule rule,
                                                                RuleApp ruleApp,
                                                                Goal goal,
                                                                Operator loopBodyModality,
                                                                Term result,
                                                                JavaBlock mainJavaBlock,
                                                                Sequent applicationSequent,
                                                                ImmutableArray<TermLabel> newTermOriginalLabels)
        Computes the TermLabel which should be added to the created loop body modality Term.
        Parameters:
        termLabelState - The TermLabelState of the current rule application.
        services - The Services.
        applicationPos - The PosInOccurrence in the Sequent to rewrite.
        rule - The Rule to apply.
        goal - The Goal to compute the result for.
        loopBodyModality - The Modality of the loop body.
        result - The postcondition of the modality.
        mainJavaBlock - The JavaBlock to execute within the modality.
        applicationSequent - The Sequent to rewrite.
        Returns:
        The TermLabels to add to the loop body modality Term.

      • getNewLocalvariable

        private ProgramVariable getNewLocalvariable(String varNameBase,
                                            String varType,
                                            Services services)
        creates a new program variable
        Parameters:
        varNameBase - a String specifying the basename of the new variable
        varType - a String specifying the typename of the new variable
        services - the Services allowing access to the variablenaming facilities
        Returns:
        a new program variable of the given type and a name as near as possible to the given basename

      • getNewLocalvariable

        private ProgramVariable getNewLocalvariable(String varNameBase,
                                            KeYJavaType varType,
                                            Services services)
        creates a new program variable
        Parameters:
        varNameBase - a String specifying the basename of the new variable
        varType - the KeYJavaType of the new variable
        services - the Services allowing access to the variablenaming facilities
        Returns:
        a new program variable of the given type and a name as near as possible to the given basename

      • neededInstantiations

        public ImmutableList<SchemaVariable> neededInstantiations(ProgramElement originalLoop,
                                                          SVInstantiations svInst)
        returns the schemavariables that are needed to transform the given loop. The unwind-loop construct may need labels if unlabeled breaks and/or continues occur in the loop. Often there will be uninstantiated Schemavariables in the loop that is why the found instantiations have to be given.

      • createLongJunctorTerm

        private Term createLongJunctorTerm(Junctor junctor,
                                   ArrayList<Term> terms)

      • normalCaseAndContinue

        private Term normalCaseAndContinue(TermLabelState termLabelState,
                                   Services services,
                                   PosInOccurrence applicationPos,
                                   Rule rule,
                                   RuleApp ruleApp,
                                   Goal goal,
                                   Sequent applicationSequent,
                                   Term contFlagTerm,
                                   Term returnFlagTerm,

      • computeLoopBodyImplicatonLabels

        private ImmutableArray<TermLabel> computeLoopBodyImplicatonLabels(TermLabelState termLabelState,
                                                                  Services services,
                                                                  PosInOccurrence applicationPos,
                                                                  Rule rule,
                                                                  RuleApp ruleApp,
                                                                  Goal goal,
                                                                  Operator operator,
                                                                  ImmutableArray<Term> subs,
                                                                  Sequent applicationSequent)
        Computes the TermLabel which should be added to the implication of the normal termination branch of a loop body.
        Parameters:
        termLabelState - The TermLabelState of the current rule application.
        services - The Services.
        applicationPos - The PosInOccurrence in the Sequent to rewrite.
        rule - The Rule to apply.
        goal - The Goal to compute the result for.
        operator - The Operator of the new Term.
        subs - The children of the new Term.
        applicationSequent - The Sequent to rewrite.
        Returns:
        The TermLabels to add to the new Term.

        private Term throwCase(TermLabelState termLabelState,
                       ProgramVariable excFlag,
                       ProgramVariable thrownException,
                       Term post,
                       Rule rule,
                       RuleApp ruleApp,
                       Goal goal,
                       PosInOccurrence applicationPos,
                       Services services)
